name: chess-gpt-4.5M
license_evidence: cardData.license='mit' via HF API; README.md YAML front-matter has 'license: mit'. No standalone LICENSE file in repo (404 on LICENSE/LICENSE.txt/LICENSE.md), but the explicit HF license field + card front-matter is a definitive permissive tag.
architecture: GPT2LMHeadModel (gpt2), 8 layers, n_embd=256, 4 heads, vocab=32, n_positions=1024
quant: int4 (group=64, row-wise symmetric) headliner; int8 (group=128) also built
runtime: GPT2 inference. Minimal: nanoGPT (karpathy) or llama2.c-style C runner; 32-token chess vocab carried in bundle (vocab.json). Tied embeddings (lm_head = wte^T). No full WASM built; runtime is a stub note + the standard nanoGPT forward pass.
compression: xz -9e (LZMA2) over [quantized packed weights + fp16 scales + fp16 LN/bias + config.json/vocab.json/generation_config.json]
notes: Tiny chess move generator. int4 on-tape 3.02 MB matches the ~3.2MB campaign estimate. int4 mean-rel quant error 0.17 (typical for 4-bit on a 256-dim model); int8 at 6.26 MB is near-lossless (relerr 0.011) if fidelity matters more than size. Embeddings dominate at this size (wte 32x256 + wpe 1024x256).
